prompt: A smartphone screenshot of the ChatGPT mobile app in dark mode, showing a generated image embedded in a conversation. The top header is a black interface with a left menu icon, the word ChatGPT, a small pink heart decoration near the title, and two rounded buttons on the right for edit/share and more options, all with a subtle purple glow. The main generated image is a rounded-corner 2x2 comic grid with exactly 4 panels, numbered 1, 2, 3, and 4 in pink circles. The comic has a dreamy bedtime aesthetic in warm pastel pink, lavender, cream, and soft gold lighting. In every panel, a fluffy white puppy with long droopy ears, a tiny pink bow near one ear, and a gentle emotional face comforts a small gray kitten plush-like character on a pink bed. The room is cozy and childlike, filled with glowing fairy lights, star-shaped bokeh, plush toys, pillows, a crescent moon visible through the window, and soft blankets. Panel 1 shows the white puppy sitting upright beside the gray kitten and holding open a picture book or storybook, both tucked into bed, with several lines of Chinese dialogue text above and small speech bubbles. Panel 2 shows the puppy hugging the kitten more closely under the blanket while talking softly, with a teddy bear or bunny plush visible on the right and Chinese text at the top. Panel 3 shows the kitten looking sadder and more curled up while the puppy wraps around it protectively, with a cup on a bedside surface in the foreground and more Chinese dialogue text. Panel 4 shows both characters lying down sleepily under the blanket, cuddled together, with the puppy’s eyes half-closed and the kitten resting, surrounded by warm sparkles and bedtime glow; Chinese dialogue text appears at the top. Along the bottom edge of the comic is a pale caption strip with additional Chinese text and a small bunny icon; at the lower left corner of the image area is a large Chinese button-like label reading 编辑. Beneath the comic inside the chat, there is a long block of Chinese text in white on black background, written like an emotional social-media-style caption with crying-face, moon, sparkle, and heart emojis, spanning multiple short paragraphs. At the very bottom is the ChatGPT message input bar with a plus button on the left, the placeholder text 问问 ChatGPT, a microphone icon, and a purple circular voice button on the right. The overall image should feel like an authentic app screenshot, vertically framed, high-contrast black UI around a cute bedtime four-panel illustration, with Chinese interface text and a polished mobile-product-photo look.
